meaning: adj.包括多种频率的,可用多种频率播放的
examples: The robots use laser range finders and ultra-wideband radio to determine distance to obstacles.
Each MUOS satellite features two payloads — a wideband code division multiple access (WCDMA) payload and a legacy UHF payload.
Wideband Code Division Multiple Access, or W-CDMA, is a cellular network supporting a wide range of voice, video and data services.
With ultra-wideband and 802.11n, people will shunt high-definition images amid other data around their households wirelessly.
CowView uses a type of RFID (radio frequency identification) called UWB (ultra-wideband) technology.
